subject: joco fitness has two websites working against each other
body:
Hi Mike,

I came across JoCo Fitness while looking at gyms in Franklin. 78 reviews and a 10,000 sq ft facility is impressive.

But you have two different domains -- jocogym.com and jocofitness.com -- and neither one is fully built out. That splits your Google presence in half. People searching for gyms near Franklin aren't finding either one.

I'll put together a short report showing where you stand vs. other Franklin gyms in search and what's causing the confusion. Takes me about 10 minutes.

Want me to send it over?

Eric Lefler
OphidianAI
